findings.evidence: Lines 30-40 define the generic theorem with `[IsDomain A] [IsDomain B] [Module.Flat A B]`; `rg` shows `NumberField/SplitsCompletely.lean:7` imports `TauCeti.NumberTheory.DedekindDomain.RamificationInertia` only to use `TauCeti.RamificationInertia...` at line 50.
findings.fix: Move the generalized theorem to a non-DedekindDomain ramification/inertia module, e.g. `TauCeti/NumberTheory/RamificationInertia/Galois.lean` or `TauCeti/NumberTheory/RamificationInertia.lean`, and have the Dedekind-domain file contain only the deprecated wrapper importing that module.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.RamificationInertia.ncard_primesOver_eq_natCard_iff_of_isGaloisGroup` is a domain/flat theorem under namespace `TauCeti.RamificationInertia`, but it lives in `NumberTheory/DedekindDomain/RamificationInertia.lean`.

summary: The generalized ramification/inertia theorem is no longer Dedekind-domain material, but it is still placed in the DedekindDomain subtree and imported through that path by number-field splitting code.
